title: Dr. Naledi Pandor — "Bringing the voice of freedom, justice, peace, and security to Berlin"
description: Dr. Naledi Pandor, former Minister of International Relations and Cooperation of South Africa, speaking at the Schiller Institute Conference this past Saturday, put on the table an incredible responsibility for us all, with an important call to action honoring the late Nelson Mandela’s birthday July 18, the importance of the Schiller Institute and the International Peace Coalition intervention into the world stage.
